title: Nythoria
description: A private modpack focused on quality-of-life, farming, building, and survival, made for friends to enjoy together. As it’s the first version, minor bugs or issues may occur.
body:
This is a custom modpack created for a private server.
It’s the very first modpack I’ve put together myself, so please keep in mind that it might contain some bugs or issues. Performance could also be a bit laggy at times depending on the setup.

The pack combines various quality-of-life, farming, building, and survival-focused mods to create a richer Minecraft experience for friends playing together.



<details>
<summary>Included Mods:</summary>

Lithium ; Architectury API ; Packet Fixer ; ImmediatelyFast ; RightClickHarvest ; Elytra Trims ; Accessories ; TerraBlender ; Farmer's Delight ; WI Zoom ; JamLib ; Sophisticated Core ; Terraqueous ; Elytra Slot ; Biomes O' Plenty ; Structure Pool API ; Simple Hats ; Distant Horizons ; owo-lib ; Just Enough Items ; Yeetus Experimentus ; GlitchCore ; spark ; ShetiPhianCore ; Sodium ; Sophisticated Backpacks ; Iris Shaders ; Sodium Extra ; Too Fast ; FerriteCore ; Stardew Fishing ; Caelus API ; Curios API ; Entity Culling ; Dynamic FPS ; Kotlin for Forge ; Immersive Melodies ; AppleSkin

</details>
